calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Diana Chen, CSR#11312, Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Daphne Lin, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Jennifer Perry with power of attorney for Diane Perry.

Defendant: James Rivas aka Charles Martin aka Wa'in Chungka present in pro per.

The Court stated that it had requested a copy of the power of attorney as to Diane Perry, that it was received, and that it had been reviewed.

Parties were sworn and examined.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows:

Respondent must not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements.

Contact (directly or indirectly), telephone, send messages, mail, or e-mail.

Take any action to obtain the address or location of the Petitioner or her family or caretakers.

Respondent shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected person: Diane Perry, her Residence and Vehicle.

Respondent is to move out immediately from and not return to 2522 Clay Street, S.F. CA 94115.

Respondent cannot own, possess, have, buy or try to buy, receive or try to receive, or in any other way get a gun or firearm and must turn in or sell guns or firearms.

Expires June 30, 2013

Order signed.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Reset To Jun-30-10 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
